# Pause and Resume Operations

When the Zebra ZT411 is in a paused state, the front-panel PAUSE LED is
illuminated. Press the PAUSE button on the front panel to resume printing.
Verify there are no other faults active (no head-open, media-out, or
ribbon-out alerts) before pressing PAUSE — those faults will re-pause the
printer immediately.

If the printer remains paused after pressing PAUSE, check the host queue
for a held job and clear it via lpstat / EnumJobs.
